What We Offer

Our Premium Removal Services

Whether you need a full house removal, a man-and-van for a quick job, or professional packing to keep your valuables safe, we have a service designed for your exact situation.

🏠

House Removals

Complete house removal service for all property sizes across Birmingham. Careful handling, furniture wrapping, and full transit protection included.

Learn More
🛋️

Furniture Removals

Single-item or full furniture moves, carefully wrapped and transported. Sofas, beds, wardrobes, and fragile pieces handled with precision and care.

Learn More
💼

Office Relocation

Minimise downtime with our efficient and organised commercial moving service. IT equipment, furniture, and full office relocations handled expertly.

Learn More
🏢

Commercial Removals

Large-scale business moves for warehouses, retail units, and commercial premises. Project-managed relocations with minimal disruption to operations.

Learn More
📦

Packing Services

Professional packing team to safely wrap and box all your belongings using premium materials. Room-by-room, labelled, and ready for transit.

Learn More
🚐

Man and Van

Affordable, flexible man-and-van service for smaller moves, single items, and quick deliveries across Birmingham and the West Midlands.

Learn More
View All Services →

Removals Services We Offer Across
Birmingham & the West Midlands

At The Royals Removals, we provide professional removals services across Birmingham and the West Midlands for domestic and commercial customers looking for a reliable moving company they can trust. We handle house removals, flat moves, furniture removals, office relocations, commercial moves, packing services, and urgent same-day jobs with a focus on careful handling, secure transport, and clear communication throughout. Whether you are moving within Birmingham or to a nearby area in the West Midlands, our team offers flexible support tailored to your move, including packing help, dismantling and reassembly, and fully insured transport for extra peace of mind.

View Areas We Cover

Why Royal Removals?

Moving Made Majestically Simple

Trusted by hundreds of Birmingham families to deliver a premium, stress-free moving experience. Here is what sets our removal company in Birmingham apart from the rest.

👑

Royal-Grade Care

Every item is treated as if it were our own. We use professional furniture blankets, bubble wrap, and stretch film to protect your belongings from the moment we arrive until the last box is in place.

⚡

Fast Quote Response

Fill in our simple 2-minute form and receive a personalised, transparent quote within 10 to 15 minutes. No chasing, no waiting around, no automated responses — a real person reviews every request.

🛡️

Fully Insured & Safe

Complete peace of mind with comprehensive goods-in-transit insurance. Your belongings are protected throughout the entire journey from your old home to your new one.

🗓️

Flexible Scheduling

We work around your timeline. Choose any day of the week including weekends and bank holidays. Need to change your date? No problem — we accommodate changes with minimal notice.

💰

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees, no surprise charges on the day. The quote we give you is the price you pay. We believe in honest, upfront pricing that respects your budget and your trust.

🤝

Local Birmingham Experts

Born and raised in Birmingham, we know every road, estate, and postcode. This local expertise means faster routes, better parking planning, and a smoother move for you.

Simple Process

How It Works

Moving in Birmingham with our house removal experts is easy, transparent, and stress-free. Here is our simple four-step process.

01

Get Your Free Quote

Fill in our simple 2-minute form with details about your move. Tell us your property type, where you are moving from and to, and your preferred date. You will receive a personalised, transparent quote within minutes.

02

Book Your Move

Choose your preferred date, confirm your booking, and relax. There are no hidden fees and the price we quote is the price you pay. We will confirm all the details and keep you informed as your moving day approaches.

03

We Do the Heavy Lifting

Our professional team arrives on time, handles everything carefully, and keeps you informed throughout the day. We wrap, load, transport, and unload your belongings with precision and care.

04

Settle Into Your New Home

We place everything exactly where you want it. Furniture is reassembled, boxes are placed in the right rooms, and we make sure you are completely happy before we leave. Welcome home.

What’s Included in Our
Removals Service

When you book The Royals Removals, you get more than just transport. Our removals service includes careful loading and unloading, secure handling of furniture and belongings, safe transport, and practical moving support from start to finish. Where needed, we also offer dismantling and reassembly, packing assistance, and same-day moving options, helping customers across Birmingham and the West Midlands move with less stress and more confidence.

Fully Insured Removals Birmingham

Why Insurance Matters When Moving

Moving house or office involves genuine risk. Choosing a fully insured removals company in Birmingham ensures your belongings and property are protected from start to finish — with no compromise.

🏛️

Public Liability Insurance

Our public liability removals cover protects against injury or property damage during your move.

  • ✓ Covers injury or property damage
  • ✓ Up to £5 million cover
  • ✓ Protects from unexpected accidents
🚛

Goods in Transit Insurance

Every item is covered under our goods in transit insurance throughout the entire removal journey.

  • ✓ Covers items during transport
  • ✓ Protection against theft, damage, or loss
  • ✓ Up to £50,000 cover
⚠️

What Is Not Covered

In the interest of full transparency, standard insurance does not cover the following:

  • — Items after delivery at destination
  • — Self-packed items (if not packed by us)
  • — Storage (unless separately arranged)

Want full details on our cover? Read our complete insurance information.

🛡️ View Full Insurance Details

Customer Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Birmingham Moving Logistics

We Handle The Details

Moving in Birmingham requires planning. As local experts, we manage parking and emissions compliance so you don't have to.

🅿️

Parking Dispensations

We can help advise or arrange the necessary parking suspensions for your moving day. Learn more on the Birmingham City Council page.

🍃

Clean Air Zone (CAZ) Ready

Our modern fleet of removal vehicles is fully compliant with the Birmingham Clean Air Zone. Check details at Brum Breathes.

Professional & Trusted Team

Serving Birmingham & Beyond

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly will I receive my quote? +
You will typically receive your personalised quote within 10 to 15 minutes. Our team is available 7 days a week and reviews every request personally — no automated responses.
Are you insured for damage? +
Yes, we are fully insured with comprehensive goods-in-transit cover. Your belongings are protected throughout the entire move. We also use professional wrapping and padding to prevent damage in the first place.
Do you offer packing services? +
Yes. We offer both full and partial professional packing services. Our trained packers will carefully wrap and box all of your belongings using high-quality materials. We can pack your entire property or focus on fragile and valuable items only.
Can I move on a weekend or bank holiday? +
Absolutely. We operate 7 days a week including weekends and most bank holidays. We understand that moving often needs to happen on specific days, and we are happy to accommodate your preferred schedule.
How far in advance should I book? +
We recommend booking at least 2 to 4 weeks in advance, particularly during peak periods such as summer and the end of the month. However, we do accommodate short-notice and last-minute moves whenever our schedule allows.
Do you cover areas outside Birmingham? +
Yes. While we are based in Birmingham, we serve the entire West Midlands region including Solihull, Sutton Coldfield, Coventry, Wolverhampton, Walsall, Dudley, Sandwell, and many surrounding areas. Contact us to confirm we cover your location.
How do you handle parking and Clean Air Zone (CAZ) charges? +
As local Birmingham movers, we handle all the logistics. We can help guide you on arranging parking dispensations with the City Council if needed, and our modern vehicle fleet meets Clean Air Zone requirements, so you won't face unexpected CAZ charges.
Do you dismantle and reassemble furniture? +
Yes, our team is fully equipped to dismantle and reassemble beds, wardrobes, and other large furniture items. Simply let us know what you need during your quote process so we can allocate the right amount of time for your move.

Ready for a Royal Move?

Get your free, no-obligation quote in under 2 minutes. Fill out the quick form or call us directly. Our team responds in 10 to 15 minutes.
